identity.name: Sewawala.com
identity.mission: To provide trustworthy, doorstep home and vehicle services with a modern, friction-free experience.
identity.target_audience: Local Indian homeowners and vehicle owners seeking reliable repairs and services.

grid_system.services_bento: grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4 md:gap-6
grid_system.form_layout: max-w-2xl mx-auto bg-white p-6 md:p-8 rounded-2xl shadow-sm border border-slate-100

buttons.primary: bg-orange-500 hover:bg-orange-600 text-white font-semibold py-3 px-6 rounded-lg shadow-sm transition-all hover:-translate-y-0.5 active:translate-y-0 active:shadow-none
buttons.secondary: bg-white hover:bg-slate-50 text-slate-900 border border-slate-200 font-medium py-3 px-6 rounded-lg transition-colors
buttons.ghost: text-slate-600 hover:text-slate-900 hover:bg-slate-100 font-medium py-2 px-4 rounded-lg

cards.service_card: group relative bg-white rounded-xl overflow-hidden border border-slate-200 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-all hover:border-blue-200 cursor-pointer

inputs.default: flex h-12 w-full rounded-lg border border-slate-200 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-white file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-slate-500 focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-blue-500 focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

iconography.style: Stroke width 1.5px, size 24px for standard icons, 48px for hero features

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement the 'Manrope' font from Google Fonts.
Ensure all buttons have high contrast (Orange for primary actions).
The Booking Form must be simple: Select Service -> Date/Time -> Address -> Confirm.
Use the specific image URLs provided for each service card.
The 'Services' page should be divided into 'Home Services' and 'Vehicle Services' sections.
Do not use generic gradients. Use flat colors or subtle slate gradients (#F8FAFC to #F1F5F9).
Ensure mobile responsiveness is prioritized (stack columns on mobile).
Integrate WhatsApp button (floating or distinct CTA) as requested.
universal_guidelines: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. Avoid this.
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur) where appropriate (e.g., sticky headers).
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
All interactive elements MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute.
